DF_BAGHDAD_DEADQUOTE_ABANDONED_TEAM: You abandoned your teammate. Stay together.
DF_BAGHDAD_GRAB_A_STINGER_TO_TAKE: Grab a Stinger to take out the enemy armor.
DF_BAGHDAD_STINGER_OBJ: Destroy the Tank with the Stinger.
DF_BAGHDAD_VTOL_CRASH: Leave the Warbird before it crashes!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_DAV_MORESQUADS: ^2Davis: ^7Copy all. Sending 2 more squads your way!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_DAV_ONTHERUN: ^2Davis: ^7We've got 'em on the run! TOC is in sight!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_DAV_SUPPRESSINGFIRE: ^2Davis: ^7Hard copy. We'll give you some suppressing fire!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_DAV_TORNAPART: ^2Davis: ^72-1, we're getting torn apart down here. We need those turrets neutralized!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GDN_GRABSTINGERS: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell, you're with Knox. Grab those stingers while we cover you.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GDN_IRONSENGINEERED: ^2Gideon: ^7Irons engineered it to be harmless to his own troops. The three of us must have been inoculated.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GDN_KNOXISDOWN: ^2Gideon: ^7Knox is down! I need immediate medivac on my location!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GDN_TANKSOVERRUN: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell, grab a stinger before those tanks overrun us.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GDN_TEARUSAPART: ^2Gideon: ^7Grab cover, those tanks will tear us apart in the open!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_ADVANCINGON: ^2Gideon: ^7Davis, we're advancing on the target building now.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_BREAKLINE: ^2Gideon: ^7Command, Sentinel 2-1 actual. We're rerouting to assist the 95th in breaking the enemy line.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_BUSTERNEWBAGHDA: ^2Gideon: ^7We'll buster to New Baghdad and nab Irons before he knows what hit him.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_CATCHBASTARDS: ^2Gideon: ^7Use your burners to catch up to those bastards!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_CLEARITOUT: ^2Gideon: ^7Let's get up there and clear it out!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_CLEAROUTASTS: ^2Gideon: ^7Clear out those ASTs. We need to push through to Irons!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_CLOSINGIN: ^2Gideon: ^7Bandit closing in on your six, Mitchell.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_DAMDOWN: ^2Gideon: ^7Command, the dam is down. Changing course to New Baghdad.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_DEPLOYMENTSUCCE: ^2Gideon: ^7Pod deployment successful. 1200 meters to target. Minimizing system power. Switching over to low detection.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_ELIMINATETURRET: ^2Gideon: ^7Davis, we're in position at the target building. Moving to eliminate turrets.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_ENGAGEANYTHING: ^2Gideon: ^7Engage anything that doesn't have a Sentinel beacon.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_FINALAPPROACH: ^2Gideon: ^7Command, this is Sentinel Zero One, on final approach to New Baghdad.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_GETINCLOSE: ^2Gideon: ^7Get in close and use your guns.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_GETONPOINT: ^2Knox: ^7Mitchell, get on point. We need these turrets down now!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_GETTOBUILDING: ^2Gideon: ^7Go, go! Get to the target building!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_GOHIGH1: ^2Gideon: ^7Copy all. We'll go high and see if we can get behind the enemy line.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_HARDPOINTS: ^2Gideon: ^7Lock on to those hard points and hit 'em with your missiles.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_KEEPPUSHING2: ^2Gideon: ^7Keep pushing forward, we've got to take out those turrets!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_LETSHITTHEREST: ^2Gideon: ^7Good work, Mitchell. Let's hit the rest!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_MAINTARGET: ^2Gideon: ^7Our main target is Atlas command center where Irons is directing the war effort from deep inside.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_MOVEMOVE3: ^2Gideon: ^7Move, move, we need those turrets down now!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_NEUTRALIZETURRE: ^2Gideon: ^7Kingpin, we've neutralized the turrets. We're clear for air support.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_NOUGHT: ^2Gideon: ^7Kingpin, Sentinel 2-1 approaching APC Romeo Victor Nought at Angels 5.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_PREPAREFORIMPAC: ^2Gideon: ^7Switch off heads up and prepare for touchdown.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_SORTBASTARDS: ^2Gideon: ^7Aye, let's sort these bastards then get to Irons.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_TRAJECTORY: ^2Gideon: ^7Multiple MD Turrets have been placed as air defenses around the city. We need to take them out in order to reach the command center.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_USEBLOWER: ^2Gideon: ^7Stay below it or use your blower to power past.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_GID_WILDRIDE: ^2Gideon: ^7Wild ride in. Let's meet up with Sergeant Davis.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_HOLT_THERMALS: ^2Knox: ^7All call signs, they're blanketing the area with smoke, switch to thermals and push forward.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_ILN_CAUTION: ^2Ilona: ^7Roger that, Proceed with caution, Sergeant. We'll provide air support.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_ILN_CONTAMINANT: ^2Ilona: ^7Command, we've been hit by some kind of airborne contaminant. Advise all forces fall back, I repeat fall ba-
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_ILN_DAMNSECTOR: ^2Ilona: ^7We're trying to advance, but those MD Turrets are tearing up our air support.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_ILN_GRABTHATSTINGER: ^2Ilona: ^7Mitchell, I'm covering you, grab that stinger!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_ILN_PULLBACK: ^2Ilona: ^7We need to pull our men back!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_ILN_TAKEMECHS: ^2Ilona: ^7Keep moving up and take care of those mechs!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_ILN_THEMAINASSAULT: ^2Ilona: ^7The main assault is shifting towards Atlas headquarters!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_IRN_TYRANTNATION: ^2Irons: ^7Citizens of New Baghdad. Hold strong, victory is within our grasp.  Look around you, and you will see our enemies as they fall one by one. Each and every one of you can be agents of change. Yes, we will suffer loses, we will suffer setbacks but make no mistake, we will win, your birth right. The security that you desire, the security you deserve, is within our grasp. But it can only be claimed if you are willing to fight for it
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_IRS_BUTITCANONLY: ^2Irons: ^7But, it can only be claimed if you are willing to fight for it. Fight for it.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_IRS_CITIZENSOFBAGHD: ^2Irons: ^7Citizens of New Baghdad, hold strong. Victory is within our grasp.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_IRS_EACHANDEVERY: ^2Irons: ^7Each and every one of you can be agents of change. Yes, we will suffer losses.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_IRS_LOOKAROUNDYOU: ^2Irons: ^7Look around you, and you will see our enemies fall one by one.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_IRS_THESECURITY: ^2Irons: ^7The security that you desire, the security that you deserve, is within our grasp.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_IRS_WEWILLSUFFER: ^2Irons: ^7We will suffer setbacks. But, make no mistake, we will win.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_JP1_CANCELDROP8: ^2Jet Pilot #1: ^7Apollo-2, repeat last - confirm or cancel next drop?
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_JP1_CANCELINGRUN8: ^2Jet Pilot #1: ^7Copy all, Apollo. Cancelling run. Be advised, birds are hot and available until re-tasked. Provide new targets and let us clear the way for you.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_JP1_COMMENCING8: ^2Jet Pilot #1: ^7Apollo-2, we are commencing strafing run on target position Helo-5 niner. How copy?
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_JP1_INAIR7: ^2Jet Pilot #1: ^7Apollo-2, ordinance is in the air.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_JP1_ORDINANCE7: ^2Jet Pilot #1: ^7Alright, grid 3-4-3-2-6-1. Sending some ordinance your way, guys.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_JP1_PROCEED7: ^2Jet Pilot #1: ^7Solid copy. Proceed with target, Apollo.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_KNX_GETONTHAT: ^2Knox: ^7Mitchell! Get on that turret! We're almost there, let's get that son of a bitch!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_KNX_GODDAMN: ^2Knox: ^7God damn...he did it....he fucking did it!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_KNX_MANTICORE: ^2Knox: ^7No...it's Manticore. We've got to pull back, get everyone out!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_KP_ENEMYSNIPERS: ^2Kingpin: ^7Good work 2-1. We are retasking air assets to your position. Push forward to the command center.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_KP_LOWLEVEL10: ^2Kingpin: ^7Maintain low level flight from there to New Baghdad.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_MAG_SAVEDTAIL: ^2Magik: ^7Thanks for the cover fire. You saved my tail.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_5MILES: ^2Knox: ^75 nautical miles to the rendezvous point.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_ADJACENTBUILDIN: ^2Knox: ^7I've got visuals, it's on the adjacent building, upper level!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_CONNECTING: ^2Knox: ^7Connecting the heads up to the battlefield network.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_ENEMYBIRDS: ^2Knox: ^7More enemy birds dropping in at 12 o'clock.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_EYESONIT: ^2Knox: ^7Eyes on it. 3rd floor of the target building!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_ITSGOINGDOWN: ^2Knox: ^7Get out of there, Mitchell! It's going down!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_LETSHITIT: ^2Knox: ^7We've got another active turret, southwest side. Let's hit it!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_MULTASTS: ^2Knox: ^7We've got multiple ASTs joining the Atlas ground forces.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_OVERRIDGE: ^2Knox: ^7More bandits coming over the ridge at 2 o'clock!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_PLAYINGCHICKEN: ^2Knox: ^74 Enemy birds playing chicken with us at 12 o'clock.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_SOUTHWESTCORNER: ^2Knox: ^7I see it, southwest corner of the target building, 2nd floor.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_THISWAY4: ^2Knox: ^7Mitchell, where are you going? Target building is this way!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_NOX_WEAPONCACHE: ^2Knox: ^7Gideon, give me cover fire, weapon cache dead ahead!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SO_CLEARENGAGE2: ^2Kingpin: ^7Roger, Artemis 2-1, you are cleared to engage.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SO_FLAKPERIMETER: ^2Kingpin: ^7Copy, Zero One. Enemy air defense perimeter in 1.5 klicks.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SO_OFFRADAR: ^2Kingpin: ^7Copy all, Zero One. Your squad is off the radar.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SO_SEND24: ^2Kingpin: ^7Artemis-4, this is Olympus. Send your traffic.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SO_UNABLE2: ^2Kingpin: ^7Be advised, 2-1, Iris will be unable to assist with recon in your AO.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_AAAAAAH1: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7Aaaaaaaahhh!  <Being thrown off a balcony 4 stories up)
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_AAAAAAH2: ^2Atlas Soldier #2: ^7Aaaaaaaahhh!  <Being thrown off a balcony 4 stories up)
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_CHOKING1: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7coughing/choking as he's picked up by the throat
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_FLANKPOSITION11: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7Affirmative, Apollo 6. We are bounding to flank position.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_FORTIFIED12: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7Roger. Enemies have fortified their position and have us pinned. Requesting immediate assistance.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_LANDMARK1: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7Ares-2, requesting visual landmark on map grid. How copy?
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_LOSINGTARGET: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7I'm losing targeting. What the hell is going on?
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_MAINTAINPOS4: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7Ares Zero Actual to all Ares units - maintain defensive position. Keep your spacing at 10 meters.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_MOVEMENT6: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7Yeah, roger. We've got some movement about a click to the west and just south of Al-Saadi Financial. Looks to be about 4 or 5 tangos with small arms.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_NEEDMEDIC: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7This is 4-2 *cough* *cough* we need a medic... there's some kind of poison in the smoke cloud.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_NEEDSUPPORT: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7We need support at street level. We're getting shredded by AST units! They're coming from all directions!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_PAYLOADINBOUND: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7Copy, Ares-2, we've got you. Targets confirmed. Payload inbound shortly.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_POSITION1: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7Roger, Ares, solid copy. Artillery is moving into position. Stand by.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_SEND23: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7Athena-4, this is Poseidon-3. Send, over.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_THOSEMECHS: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7Damn it! Get someone on those turrets.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_TOOMUCHFIRE: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^7Working up the right side! Too much fire coming from the target building-
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS1_WOUNDED12: ^2Sentinel Soldier #1: ^72 wounded, 1 KIA. Ammo count green. Enemy 20 plus foot mobiles.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS2_AAAAAAH1: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7Aaaaaaaahhh!  <Being thrown off a balcony 4 stories up)
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS2_AAAAAAH2: ^2Atlas Soldier #1: ^7Aaaaaaaahhh!  <Being thrown off a balcony 4 stories up)
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS2_ARTSUPPORT1: ^2Sentinel Soldier #2: ^7Poseidon 1, this is Ares-2. Request Artillery Support on map grid 3-1-3-4-6-3. How copy?
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS2_CHOKING1: ^2Atlas Soldier #2: ^7coughing/choking as he's picked up by the throat
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS2_FINBUILDING1: ^2Sentinel Soldier #2: ^7Solid copy, Poseidon. Target is west of the Al-Saadi Financial building. Multiple ASTs and uhh... 3 plus heavy armor.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS2_HEAVYLOSSES: ^2Sentinel Soldier #2: ^7Charlie company is taking heavy losses!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS2_PINNEDDOWN: ^2Sentinel Soldier #2: ^7We're pinned down. Clear those turrets!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS2_TAKINGDAMAGE: ^2Atlas Soldier #2: ^7I'm taking damage. What the, oh god no!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_AAAAAAH1: ^2Atlas Soldier #2: ^7Aaaaaaaahhh!  <Being thrown off a balcony 4 stories up)
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_AAAAAAH2: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7Aaaaaaaahhh!  <Being thrown off a balcony 4 stories up)
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_CANCELRUN8: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7Whiskey - Tango - Foxtrot - cancel your run!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_CEASEDROPS8: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7Negative, negative. We are in harm's way - cease additional drops.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_CHOKING1: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7coughing/choking as he's picked up by the throat
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_HOLD13: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7Nemesis 1, hold your position and provide a base of fire.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_IMMSTRIKE7: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7Hermes, this is Apollo-2 requesting immediate strike on target. How copy.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_LOCKEDDOWN: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7Turrets have the bridge locked down!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_MAPGRID7: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7Map Grid 3-4-3-2-6-1. West of Abdel-Rahmann building.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_MULTCONTACTS: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7Olympus, Artemis 2-1. We've got multiple enemy contacts near the large glass building, map grid 2-2-1-3-2-4. Request permission to engage. How copy, over?
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_POSITIONALDATA3: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7Athena, this is Nemesis-Actual. We have positional data at our current mark.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_SITREP12: ^2Sentinel Soldier #3: ^7Roger, hold positions and give me a sitrep.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS3_STRUCTCOMP: ^2Atlas Soldier #3: ^7Structure is compromised. What's happening, noooo!
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS4_CLEARENGAGE6: ^2Sentinel Soldier #4: ^7Roger, you are cleared to engage.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS4_CONFIRMATION6: ^2Sentinel Soldier #4: ^7Roger. Keep visuals on the tangos. Getting conformation to engage the target.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS4_HOWCOPY23: ^2Sentinel Soldier #4: ^7Athena-4, intent to capture objective bravo. How copy, over.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS4_NOTINBOUND11: ^2Sentinel Soldier #4: ^7We are moving back to defensive positions. Air support is not inbound.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS4_SITREPD23: ^2Sentinel Soldier #4: ^7Poseidon-3, this is Athena-4. Stand by for sitrep, over.
SUBTITLE_DOGFIGHT_DF_SS4_SUPPORT24: ^2Sentinel Soldier #4: ^7Olympus, Artemis-4 requesting QRF support at my pos. Hostile forces engaging from our north.
_X4WALKER_WHEELS_ENTER: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Enter the MD Turret
_X4WALKER_WHEELS_ENTER_PC: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Enter the MD Turret
_X4WALKER_WHEELS_EXIT: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Exit the MD Turret
_X4WALKER_WHEELS_MELEE_HINT: Press ^3[{+melee}]^7 to Enter the MD Turret
